conflict_name: World War II major urban battles - Asia (shortlist excluding Manila and atomic bombings)
aliases: WWII major urban battles in Asia
family_summary: Shortlist of major Asian urban battle/fall-of-city episodes from 1937-08-13 to 1942-02-15, kept separate from later occupation, massacre, famine, POW, and deprivation mortality unless sources cleanly isolate the battle window.
notes: Episode-first bundle. Manila excluded because it has a dedicated prompt. Hiroshima and Nagasaki excluded because atomic-bombing episodes are handled separately.
